# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x5
li a1, 0x7
add a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xc

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
addi t1, x0, 1
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 5
addi x6, x0, 10
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 15

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, 5
addi x2, x0, 7
add x3, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 12

# 5 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 1
add a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 6 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 7 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 8 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 1
slli t0, t0, 63
addi t1, t0, -1
addi t1, t1, 1
# Result: t1 = 0x8000000000000000

# 9 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# 10 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x6, x0, 42
addi x5, x6, 0
# Result: x5 = 42

# 11 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addiw a1, a0, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 12 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 1
slli t0, t0, 32
addiw t2, t0, -1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 13 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x80000
addiw a0, a0, 0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 14 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui x1, 0x7ffff
addi x1, x1, -1
addiw x2, x1, 1
# Result: x2 = 0x7ffff000

# 15 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x123456787FFFFFFF
addiw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 16 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 1
slli t0, t0, 31
addiw t1, t0, 0
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 17 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
li t1, 2
addw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# 18 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7fffffff
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 19 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -2147483648
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 20 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 1
addw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 21 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0xaa
addi t1, x0, 0x55
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# 22 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 42
addi x6, x0, 12
and x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 8

# 23 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 42
addi t1, x0, 51
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 34

# 24 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 0xaa
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xaa

# 25 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

# 26 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
addi t1, x0, -1
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 27 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5,0xAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
li x6,0x5555555555555555
and x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 28 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
andn a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xf000f000f000f000

# 29 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
andi t1, t0, 0xff
# Result: t1 = 0xff

# 30 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
andi a1, a0, 0xf0
# Result: a1 = 0xf0

# 31 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 255
andi x6, x5, -1
# Result: x6 = 255

# 32 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x123
andi t1, t0, 0xf0
# Result: t1 = 0x20

# 33 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x6, x0, -2
andi x5, x6, -2
# Result: x5 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 34 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0x7ff
andi x5, x5, 0x555
# Result: x5 = 0x555

# 35 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 0x123
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0x23

# 36 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 74565
# Result: a0 = 0x923451e6

# 37 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x123
# Result: a0 = 0x801231e6

# 38 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x80000
# Result: a0 = 0x1e6

# 39 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x800011e6

# 40 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x923451e6

# 41 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
jalr zero, 8(t0)
addi a0, zero, 0x42
# Result: a0 = 0x42

# 42 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
lw t1, 0(t0)
# Result: t1 != 0

# 43 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
# Result: t0 = 0x800001e6

# 44 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, 5
li x6, 7
# Result: x5 = 5

# 45 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 5
li a1, 7
# Result: a0 = 5

# 46 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 47 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 5
# Result: x5 = 5

# 48 # Extension Must Be Active: C
# Result: x5 = 0

# 49 # Extension Must Be Active: C
# Result: a0 = 0

# 50 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
# Result: x5 = 0

# 51 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, 0x1FFFFFFFF
# Result: x5 = 0x1ffffffff

# 52 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x80000001
mv a1, a0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001 & a1 = 0xffffffff80000001

# 53 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, -1
li x6, 1
# Result: x5 = -1

# 54 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 3
# Result: t0 = 5

# 55 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 10
li a1, 5
# Result: a0 = 10

# 56 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
li a0, 0xFF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F
# Result: a0 = 0xff00ff00

# 57 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
# Result: a0 = 0xff00ff00ff00ff00

# 58 # Extension Must Be Active: RVC
addi a0, x0, 0xf
addi a1, x0, 0x5
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# 59 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 5
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 1

# 60 # Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF1
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffff1

# 61 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0x5

# 62 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 3
# Result: t0 = 0x5

# 63 # Extension Must Be Active: C

li a1, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
# Result: a0 = 0xf0f0f0f0f0f0f0f

# 64 # Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 65 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
addi x8, x0, 1
# Result: x8 = 0x1

# 66 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
li a0, -8
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffff8

# 67 # Extension Must Be Active: C

# Result: s0 = 0xaa

# 68 # Extension Must Be Active: C

# Result: s0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

li s1, 0x6
# Result: s0 = 0x3

# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# Result: x5 = 0xaa

# 73 # Extension Must Be Active: Zca
li a0, 0x12345678

# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# 74 # Extension Must Be Active: Zcb
addi a0, x0, 0xf
addi a1, x0, 0xf0
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# 75 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 10
addi a1, zero, 3
div a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3

# 76 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 12345
li a1, 123
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a5, a4, a3
# Result: a5 = 12345

li t0, 5
div t1, t0, x0
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

li t1, -1
div t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x8000000000000000

li a2, 3
divu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 3

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 81 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, -1
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

addi t1, x0, 3
divw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# 83 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a2, 2
divuw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# 84 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 3
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3 & a3 = 1

# 85 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 100
li a1, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 33

divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: x12 = 0

# 90 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi a1, zero, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3 & a3 = 1

# 91 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 10
addi a2, x0, 2
divu a0, a1, a2
or a3, a0, x0
# Result: a0 = 5

# 92 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 100
addi a1, x0, 7
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
# Result: a4 = 100

# 93 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0x10
addi a1, zero, 4
divuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 4

# 94 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

li t1, 0x1234567800000000

# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 96 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, 0x00000002
divuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 4

# 97 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x6 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# Result: a2 = -3

# 100 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi a1, zero, 7
divw a2, a0, a1
remw a3, a0, a1
mulw t0, a1, a2
addw t0, t0, a3
xor t1, t0, a0
sltiu t1, t1, 1
# Result: t1 = 1

li x1, 10
divw x5, x1, x0
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: t0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

or x10, x10, x13
addi x11, x0, 2
divw x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0xffffffffc0000000

# Result: a0 = 0x1000

# Result: t0 = 0xabcde000

# Result: a0 = 0x80000000

li a1, 2

# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 109 # Extension Must Be Active: M
li x5, 3
li x6, 5
mul x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 15

# 110 # Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
csrr t0, misa
li t1, 0x1000
not t1, t1
and t0, t0, t1
csrw misa, t0
li a0, 6
li a1, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 42

# 111 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 3
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 15

# 112 # Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, 3
addi x6, x0, 4
mul x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 12

# 113 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, -1
lui a2, 0x1
addi a2, a2, 2
mul a0, a1, a2
srl a0, a0, 32
# Result: a0 != 0xffffffff

# 114 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x1
slli t0, t0, 32
li t1, 0x2
slli t1, t1, 32
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 2

# 115 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 5
li t1, 3
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 15

# 116 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, 3
addi x2, x0, 4
mulh x3, x1, x2
mul x4, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 0

# 117 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0x100000001
mulhu x11, x10, x10
mul x12, x10, x10
# Result: x11 = 0x1 & x12 = 0x200000001

# 118 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
mulh a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x3fffffffffffffff

# 119 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi t1, x0, 2
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

mulh a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x3fffffffffffffff

# 121 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0x8000000000000000
addi x11, x0, -2
mulh x12, x10, x11
mul x13, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0x1 & x13 = 0

# 122 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi a3, x0, 5
mulh a4, a2, a3
mul a5, a2, a3
# Result: a5 = 15

# 123 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0
li x6, 0
mulh x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# 124 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, -1
mulhsu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x7ffffffffffffffe

# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: a2 = 0x7ffffffffffffffe

# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

li a2, 1

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 129 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a2, 2
mulhu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# 130 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 131 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2

mul t1, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 0x1 & t1 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# 132 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li x11, 2
mulhu x12, x10, x11
or x13, x12, x0
# Result: x12 = 0x1

# 133 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0xffffffffffffffff
li x6, 2
mulhu x7, x5, x6
mul x8, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0x1

# 134 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, -1
li a2, 2
mulw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: a2 = 12

# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: t2 = 0x369d0368

# 139 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 140 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 141 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 142 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, -1
addi x2, x0, 1
or x3, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 143 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0x7ff
addi t1, x0, -16
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 144 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 3
addi a2, x0, 0
czero.nez a3, a0, a1
# Result: a3 = 0x0

# 145 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x5
li t1, 0x3
li t2, 1
czero.eqz t2, t2, x0
or t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 0x7

# 146 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0xf0
ori x6, x5, -256
# Result: x6 = -16

# 147 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori t0, x0, -1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 148 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x12345678abcdef01
ori x6, x5, -2048
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffffffffff01

# 149 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 10
li t1, 3
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 1

# 150 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, x0, -10
addi t2, x0, 3
rem t0, t1, t2
# Result: t0 = -1

# 151 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
rem a2, a0, x0
# Result: a2 = 0x12345678

# 152 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, -1
rem a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 153 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# 154 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0x80000
addi t0, t0, 5
addi t1, x0, 3
remuw t2, t0, t1
remuw t3, t0, x0
# Result: t2 = 0x1 & t3 = 0xffffffff80000005

# 155 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x123456789ABC
li a1, 0x11223344
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
xor t0, a4, a0
# Result: t0 = 0

# 156 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 10
addi a2, x0, 3
remu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# 157 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x0000000100000005
li t1, 0x0000000200000003
remuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 2

# Result: a2 = 0

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: a2 = 0x12345678abcdef01

# Result: a2 = 42

# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: a2 = 1

# Result: t1 = 0 & t3 = 1

# Result: x5 = 1

# Result: a2 = 0

# 283 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
vsetvli t0, x0, e64, m1
li a1, 0xaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
vmv.v.x v1, a1
li a2, 0x5555555555555555
vmv.v.x v2, a2
vxor.vv v3, v2, v1
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 284 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 4
vsetvli t0, a0, e8, m1
li t1, 0xAA
vmv.v.x v2, t1
li t2, 0x55
vxor.vx v3, v2, t2
vmv.x.s a1, v3
# Result: a1 = 0xFF

# 285 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t0, 0xAA
vmv.v.x v2, t0
vxor.vi v1, v2, 0xF
vmv.x.s a0, v1
# Result: a0 = 0xa5

# 286 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x5
li t1, 0xA
vsetvli t2, zero, e64, m1
vmv.v.x v1, t0
vmv.v.x v2, t1
vredxor.vs v3, v2, v1, v0
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# 287 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi sp, sp, -8
li t0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd t0, 0(sp)
li t1, 0x1111111111111111
amoxor.d a0, t1, (sp)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 288 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, x0, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 289 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

xori a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffff00

# 290 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

xori a0, a0, 0x7ff
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 291 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x0123456789ABCDEF
xori a0, a1, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xfedcba9876543210

# 292 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

not t1, a0
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff & t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 293 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x12345678abcdef01
xori x5, x5, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xedcba987543210fe

# 294 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkr
csrr t0, 0x747
andi t0, t0, 0
# Result: t0 = 0
